name: bpsemi
tagline: Leading LED Lighting Driver and Power Management IC Solutions
description: BPSemi is a leading Chinese semiconductor company specializing in LED lighting driver ICs, power management ICs, and motor driver solutions. With over 20 years of experience, BPSemi provides high-performance, cost-effective analog and mixed-signal ICs for lighting, consumer electronics, and industrial applications.
longDescription: BPSemi (Shanghai Bright Power Semiconductor) is a premier Chinese fabless semiconductor company founded in 2008, headquartered in Shanghai. The company specializes in the design and development of high-performance analog and mixed-signal integrated circuits, with particular expertise in LED lighting driver ICs, AC/DC power management ICs, and DC/DC converter solutions. BPSemi has established itself as a market leader in China's LED lighting driver market, serving top-tier lighting manufacturers worldwide. Their product portfolio addresses a wide range of applications including general lighting, smart home, consumer electronics, and industrial power systems. As an authorized distributor, LiTong provides comprehensive technical support, application guidance, and supply chain services for BPSemi products, helping customers optimize their designs and accelerate time-to-market.

coreProducts.name: LED Lighting Drivers
coreProducts.description: High-efficiency LED driver ICs for general lighting, smart lighting, and specialty lighting applications with advanced dimming and power factor correction features.

coreProducts.name: AC/DC Power Management
coreProducts.description: Comprehensive AC/DC converter solutions for adapters, chargers, and auxiliary power supplies with high efficiency and low standby power.

coreProducts.name: DC/DC Converters
coreProducts.description: High-performance DC/DC buck and boost converters for consumer electronics, industrial, and automotive applications with wide input voltage range.

coreProducts.name: Motor Drivers
coreProducts.description: Integrated motor driver solutions for DC motors, stepper motors, and brushless DC motors in consumer and industrial applications.

industries.name: LED Lighting
industries.description: General lighting, commercial lighting, industrial lighting, and smart lighting systems requiring high-efficiency drivers.

industries.name: Consumer Electronics
industries.description: Power adapters, chargers, and power management for smartphones, tablets, laptops, and home appliances.

industries.name: Industrial Power
industries.description: Industrial power supplies, motor control, and automation systems requiring reliable power management solutions.

industries.name: Smart Home
industries.description: IoT devices, smart home appliances, and connected lighting systems with intelligent control features.

certifications.name: ISO 9001
certifications.description: Quality Management System Certification ensuring consistent product quality and reliability.

certifications.name: ISO 14001
certifications.description: Environmental Management System Certification demonstrating commitment to environmental responsibility.

certifications.name: AEC-Q100
certifications.description: Automotive Electronics Council qualification for automotive-grade integrated circuits.

seoTitle: BPSemi | LED Driver & Power Management IC Distributor | LiTong
seoDescription: Authorized BPSemi distributor offering LED lighting drivers, AC/DC power management ICs, DC/DC converters, and motor drivers. Technical support and selection guide available.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of BPSemi products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong is an authorized core distributor of BPSemi (晶丰明源) products. We maintain direct partnerships with BPSemi and provide genuine products with full factory warranty. Our authorization covers the complete BPSemi product portfolio including LED lighting drivers, AC/DC power management ICs, DC/DC converters, and motor drivers. Customers can verify our distributor status directly with BPSemi or through our authorization certificates.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for BPSemi product inquiries and technical support. We provide competitive pricing and reliable supply chain services.

faqs.question: What are BPSemi's core product categories and market position?
faqs.answer: BPSemi is a leading Chinese fabless semiconductor company specializing in four core product categories: LED lighting drivers (market leader in China), AC/DC power management ICs, DC/DC converters, and motor drivers. The company holds significant market share in China's LED lighting driver market and serves top-tier lighting manufacturers globally. Their products are known for high efficiency, cost-effectiveness, and reliable performance. BPSemi's technical strengths include advanced dimming control, power factor correction, and low standby power design.
faqs.decisionGuide: For LED lighting and power management applications, BPSemi offers competitive solutions. Contact LiTong FAEs for product selection guidance.

faqs.question: What technical support does LiTong provide for BPSemi products?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for BPSemi products including application circuit design, PCB layout review, thermal analysis, and debugging assistance. Our FAE team has extensive experience with BPSemi's LED driver and power management solutions. We offer reference design evaluation, BOM optimization, and design review services. For complex projects, we can arrange direct technical support from BPSemi's application engineering team.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong FAEs early in your design cycle for optimal product selection and application support.

faqs.question: How do I select the right BPSemi LED driver for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right BPSemi LED driver requires considering several key parameters: input voltage range, output current/power requirements, dimming method (analog, PWM, or digital), power factor correction needs, and efficiency targets. BPSemi offers isolated and non-isolated solutions for different power levels. For general lighting applications, consider the BP series for high PF requirements. For smart lighting, look for drivers with integrated dimming interfaces. LiTong FAEs can provide detailed selection guidance based on your specific application requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Provide your application specifications to LiTong FAEs for personalized product recommendations and reference designs.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of choosing BPSemi over international competitors?
faqs.answer: BPSemi offers several competitive advantages: cost-effectiveness without compromising quality, fast technical support with local application teams, flexible customization options for high-volume customers, reliable supply chain with domestic manufacturing partners, and continuous innovation in LED driver and power management technologies. Their products meet international standards and certifications while offering better price-performance ratios compared to many international competitors. BPSemi's strong presence in the Chinese market ensures stable supply and responsive customer service.
faqs.decisionGuide: For cost-sensitive applications requiring reliable performance, BPSemi provides excellent value. Contact LiTong for competitive quotations.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for BPSemi products?
faqs.answer: Standard BPSemi products typically have lead times of 4-8 weeks depending on order volume and current demand. LiTong maintains strategic inventory of popular BPSemi products to support customers with urgent requirements. For high-volume production orders, we recommend placing forecasts to ensure continuous supply. Contact LiTong sales team for current lead time information and inventory availability. We can also discuss consignment inventory programs for customers with predictable demand patterns.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong early in your project planning to discuss supply requirements and inventory management options.

faqs.question: Does BPSemi provide reference designs and evaluation kits?
faqs.answer: Yes, BPSemi provides comprehensive reference designs, evaluation kits, and application notes for their product families. These resources include complete schematics, PCB layouts, BOMs, and test reports. LiTong can provide evaluation boards for key products to support customer development and testing. Reference designs cover typical applications such as LED bulbs, downlights, panel lights, power adapters, and motor control systems. Contact LiTong to request specific reference designs or evaluation kits for your application.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request evaluation kits and reference designs from LiTong to accelerate your product development cycle.
